verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If my people will humble themselves Humble themselves and pray If they seek my face and humble themselves And turn from their wicked ways

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will hear from heaven and forgive their sins I will hear from heaven and heal their land

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, heal our land Father, heal our land Hear our cry and turn our nation back to You Lord, heal our land Hear us oh, Lord, and heal our land Forgive our sin and heal our broken land

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, we vow our knee, we humble ourselves Humble ourselves and pray Lord, we seek your face and humble ourselves And turn from my wicked ways

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Father in Your mercy, forgive our sins Father in Your mercy, come heal our land

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord, heal our land Father, heal our land Hear our cry and heal our broken land
